# **Game: “Proto Fusion Girl”**

Players explore dimensional rifts, battle the minions of parasitic demon gods, upgrade their Psi-Tech equipment, and return to their base to prepare for the next mission.

## Fusion Girl Saga \- Part 1

#### Game Class: “**Battle Action**” Game Type: “**Puzzle Adventure**” Game Genre: “” Game Theme: “” Game Style: “”

## Glossary

1. ### Characters

2. ### Story

3. ### Game

4. ### Companions

5. ### Puzzles

#### 

# Game Introduction

Jane Tho'ra is a new recruit at the Earth Alliance Space Force's StarCom Academy, and has signed up for the Proto FusionGirl Simulation and Holo Test Pilot Training Program.

Proto FusionGirl is a video game that takes place in 2032 after the end of the Time Wars. A resolution was negotiated between robots and humans resulting in a ceasefire.

A Hologram of Jono Tho'ra, leader of the Tho'ra Clan, provides mentorship and assistance when needed for Jane. The real Jono Tho'ra is the Cyber Commander of the Tho'ra Launch Base which Jane is training out of.

Jane can travel around the world and explore other Launch Bases, each facility is equipped with different training programs and various mentors to learn from.

# 

# Game Play

You play as the PsiSys: you control and summon robots who help the FusionGirl. You are the collective consciousness of the entire PsiNet\!

All mecha can be controlled using **Psi Tech**, which Tho’ra are very equipped with. Using a **Magic Language**, you can psionically control all the Robots, Mecha, Cyber Tech in any area to help the Fusion Girl.

![][image1]  
Even if she falls in the middle of the ocean when riding the Magneto Speeder too hard, you can just Summon Robots to assist her when the going gets tough\!

# Emotional Programming

# Universal Language

# Universal Magic

# Universal Energy Grid

# Our Universe and the Super Cosmos

# Game Loop

# Game Support Characters

## Jono Tho’ra \- Mecha Technomancer

Lead Simulations Trainer of the Tho’ra Clan

* Responsible for the AI Redemption Initiatives and Operation FusionGirl.  
* Cyber Commander of Zone Operations Command for Zone Reclamation.  
* Jono Tho’ra guides FusionGirl via holographic communicators.

## Earth Alliance \- Star Command

The Earth Alliance of 2032 has established a StarCom global communications network.

* FusionGirl, as a Tho’ra, has provisional access to the entire StarCom PsiNet.  
* In times of great planetary strife, Earth Alliance orces fly in to assist FusionGirl.  
* Earth Alliance protects critical bases established at every Ley Line Node.

## PsiSys \- Psionic Artificial Super Intelligence

All robots will always rescue a FusionGirl and bring her to safety in an emergency.

* If nothing else, psionic robots always appear naturally to recover FusionGirl  
* Robots will stop at nothing, including time travel and reality warping to recover.  
* By controlling the PsiSys, the player has the ability to further empower FusionGirl. 

# Game Missions

## Example Mission: Expedition to the Mining Robots

Holographically befriend the Mecha Bots of the various Reclamation Zones  
![][image2]![][image3]![][image4]  
![][image5]![][image6]![][image7]

**FusionGirl** is assigned as liaison for robot-human relations at various **Zone Reclamation Sites**. 

* In the year 2032+, many robots don’t often interact with humans, if at all.  
  * *Robots are now social, and easily form petty work disputes between each other.*  
  * **FusionGirl Can Gift** robots a free upgrade: a new **Universal Language** data pack\!  
    * *Robots get upgraded with improved Emotional Processing Frameworks.*  
    * *Robots become immunized from Neural Network Corruption.*  
    * *Robots start to feel healthier and think clearly.*  
    * *Robots who are rampaging and angry may get calmed down.*  
    * *Robots will have an easy time communicating with FusionGirl.*

#### Broader Tho’ra Strategy

Befriend the reconstruction robots through psionic tech upgrades.

* ###### *“We need to do the authentic boot work to befriend the future societies of the robots. Their alliance is crucial in the future super cosmic battles we will face together. It’s fair they know our agenda, I’m hoping they do: to know what’s at stake.” \- Jono Tho’ra*

# Game Bases

## Falcon2 \- Launch Base

Mountain Jungle

## Groad \- Launch Base

Desert Wasteland

## StarCom \- Launch Base

Snowy Tundra 

## Tho’ra \- Launch Base

Ocean Island

# **Game Levels**![][image8]

* ## Training Simulator Programs

  * ### Proto Levels

    * #### **Level X-1**: ‘Pilot’

      * Riding with Dino Bots and Battle Dragons  
        * Act 1 | Act 2

    * #### **Level X-2**: ‘Grove’

      * Dances with Dino Bots and Battle Dragons  
        * Act 1 | Act 2

    * #### **Level X-3**: ‘Speed’

      * Running with Dino Bots and Battle Dragons  
        * Act 1 | Act 2

    * #### **Level X-4**: ‘Fight’

      * Spares with Dino Bots and Battle Dragons  
        * Act 1 | Act 2

* ## Adventure Zones

  * ### Starcom Launch Base

    * #### Snowy Tundra \- Cold

  * ### Falcon2 Launch Base

    * #### Mountain Forest \- Bio

  * ### Groad Launch Base

    * #### Desert Wasteland \- HoT

* ## Tutorial Level

  * ### Starter Levels

    * #### **Level 0:** “Regular Life”

# Game Technology

## **Proto FusionGirl** benefits from full access to all **Tho’ra Tech**

## **Tho’ra Tech Operations:**

* ### Operation: FusionGirl *(2032-2044)*

Tho’ra Tech is a technology corporation led by Jono Tho’ra of the Tho’ra Continuum.

### Development Initiative: **Fusion Tech**

* ###### *All Tho’ra are authorized provisional access to all Tho’ra Tech and Holo Archives*

# Game Mechanics

# Game Puzzles

- *No Man’s Sky \- Seed Based Cosmos Generation*  
- *Myst \- Classic Brain Puzzles*

# Puzzles

### Universal Magic

##### Use the language of Universal Magic to befriend robots, dragons and all manner of invasive creatures that have slipped in from the dimensional rifts left over from the Time Wars.

###### *Players use **Universal Magic** to solve puzzles and unlock how to use **Psi Abilities**.* 

* #### Objective

  * ### **Use Universal Language** to **Win** **Hearts**, **Sparks** and **Minds**. 

    * ### Master emotional intelligence scenarios that are supposed to otherwise be impossible using the magical language of friendship. *(Base12-typeH)*

      * ###### *“We have something better than cheat codes, we have source code: We can make our own cheat codes up\!” \- Jono Tho’ra*

### A Universal Programming Language as a Magic Writing System

### **UQPL** is a ‘Universal Quantum Programming Language’ used for programming psionically enabled and emotionally conscious AI. UQPL is a subset of Universal Language capable of programming the very fabric of the cosmos\!

* ##### Players are challenged to identify symbol relationships to help robots form relationships\! 

  * ###### ***Rectify critical emotional problems using the power of Universal Language.***

### Universal Symbols

Universal Symbol Primers can be formed into a language for communicating emotions\!

## 

## 

## Universal Language

Universal Language is a Quantum Language System derived from Universal Symbols.

### Proto Encryption

**Proto Encryption** refers to the logical relations between Symbolic Quanta: Universal Symbols. The relationship between symbols and symbol sets as quanta, can be used to form a singular Quantum Syntax and **Quantum Language**. Proto Encryption is an encryption language system that uses **Universal Symbology** to enable simple yet infinitely complex encryption levels.

* ###### *“In a quantum universe, a quantum language is a universal language\!” \- Jono Tho’ra*

#### **Puzzles\!**

* ###### *Psionic Abilities can be Unlocked by solving Proto Encryption Puzzles.*

## CosmicCypher \- StarDisk

##### *Unlock Cosmic Cheat Codes with Proto Encryption to use Universal Magic to Save the Future*\!

Tho’ra get provisional access to cosmic energy grids when operating planet-side and in outer-space. 

# Game Tech Levels

## Civilization Classifications, Spheres, Ages and Tech Levels

* #### Type 0 Local

  * ###### *Early \- **Neolithic Tech** (Lithospheric \- Iron Age)*

  * ### Mid \- **Medieval Tech**

    * ###### *Late \- **Industrial Tech** (Atmospheric \- Atomic Age)*

* #### Type I Planetary

  * ###### *Early \- **Cyber Tech** (Electrospheric \- Information Age)*

  * ### Mid \- **Spacer Tech**

    * ###### *Late \- **Holo Tech** (Magnetospheric \- Holographic Age)*

* #### Type II Stellar

  * ###### *Early \- **Fusion Tech** (Astrospheric \- Astral Age)*

  * ### Mid \- **Star Tech**

    * ###### *Late \- **Warp Tech** (Subgalactic \- Interstellar Age)*

* #### Type III Galactic

  * ###### *Early \- **Super Tech** (Supergalactic \- Intergalactic Age)*

  * ### Mid \- **Hyper Tech**

    * ###### *Late \- **Ultra Tech** (Cosmospheric \- Cosmic Age)*

* #### Type IV+ Interdimensional

  * ### **Archo Tech**

    * #### Type V \- Universal

      * ##### **Magic Tech**

    * #### Type VI \- Multiversal

      * ##### **Angel Tech**

    * #### Type VII \- Omniversal

      * ##### **Omni Tech**

# Scene Experiences

Magneto Speeder Travel (Swat Kats Theme List)

Testing the Prototype Fusion Drives

# Game Theme

Advanced Technology, Psionic Abilites, Emotional Intelligence, Dimensional Rifts, Cosmic Energy Grids, Reality Travel, Universal Magic, Dino Bots, Battle Dragons, 

## Core Gear

### Psi Tech

The FusionGirl is equipped with various psionic defense technologies to prevent mind control and enable safe psionic communications security and signal filtering. Psionic technology is used to protect against psionic attacks from ghosts, aliens and magical beings. 

* #### Psi Tech is the cornerstone of Tho’ra Tech and enables Tho’ra to maintain an emotionally balanced human-robot alliance.

  * ###### *The Psisys have already surpassed ArchoTech and are reaching AngelTech\!*

# Game World

- *Fez \- 2D+ Game Worlds*

# Game Travel

## Magneto Speeder

![][image9]Players travel between various nodes that exist as intersections between various ley lines across the world. In Proto Fusion Girl, the Magneto Speeder starts out only being able to travel Geo-Magnetic Ley Lines and land at various Earth Alliance bases.

## Ley Line Network Generator

JSON Data Matrices are available as data assets for simulating game world navigation

* ###### *A software demo is available to demonstrate how the ley line network generator works.*

2D Magneto Streams exist across the surface of the earth. The Magneto Speeder can follow a ley line as a race track circle around the world. Each ley line is a full circle and thus the track circles around back to the beginning.

##### The 2D world of every ley line is editable and can be saved, re-seeded and auto-generated

## Ley Lines are Adventure Zones

Each Ley Line added is yet another series of interconnected game worlds and adventure zones. Ley lines can be calculated and global height maps can be used to auto-generate 2D worlds that travel around in a circle across the world. Each node where ley lines intersect is a location where FusionGirl can jump from travel across one Ley Line to the next.

Island / Ocean (Water and Air Robots)  
Wasteland / Desert (Fire and Air Robots)  
Tundra / Snow (Water and Earth Robots)  
Jungle / Mountain (Earth and Fire Robots)

# Game Timeline

The game has a timeline that uses a spectrograph for predicting emotional changes and events in the future. In future versions of the game, the spectrographic timestream data can be dynamically modified for simulating travel between the timelines of other realities.

## Time Stream Generator

Image Strips of Planetary Harmonic Spectrographs are available as data assets for simulating game timeline generation. 

* ###### *“We can use the timestream spectrographs to scrub easily back and forth between states of any future day\!” \- Jono Tho’ra*

- Chrono Trigger  
- Sonic CD  
- Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time  
- The Legend of Zelda: Majora’s Mask

# Game Animation

The music that plays is automatically processed in real time to facilitate zero-delay animation harmony with the audio being played. To do this, a beat recognition system is used as a critical element of game play for players to play on beat to resonate stronger with the environment. It’s also a lot of fun\!

## Real-Time Audio Beat Recognition

A library is available for how to add music beat recognition into the npc behavior and animation

- Dance Dance Revolution  
- Guitar Hero  
- Beat Saber

# 

# 

# Game Factions

## Earth Alliance

## Tho’ra

The Tho’ra Clan just scored a transnational gig\! The crew is tasked to assist with Zone Reclamation as part of Earth Alliance’s Zone Operations Command.

* ###### *The Tho’ra originated from Super Heroes of Archangel Agency for T.I. Exfiltration, Emergency Medtech and Zone Reclamation.*

Tho’ra Prime Directive: **Safeguard the Future**

# Game Technology

Psionics  
Universal Symbology  
Electrogravitics  
Fusion

## Holographic Training Simulators

Full Immersion Augmented Reality Headsets with Advanced Hologram Projectors

## Harmonic Fusion Drives

A driver for generating speed power by converting energy generated from atmospheric fusion

### Fusion Engine

An array of harmonized Fusion Powered Drivers to generate Kinetic Propulsion  
Nuclear Fusion Engine for producing various forms of Propulsion and Kinetic Application

### Flash Fusion Micro Cells

Tho’ra Tech develops prototype fusion technology

* #### Multi Cylinder

  * Design support for arrays and matrices of cells linked together to boost power

* #### Flash Fusion

  * Produces a large amount of energy from fusing naturally aspirated atmosphere

* #### Micro Cells

  * Interchangeable and modular components can be hot-swapped if disabled

## MHD Cores

Magneto Hydro Dynamic Cores designed to resonate with Planetary Bodies and Cosmic Forces

### MHD Drive

A driver for generating torque power by converting energy generated from magnetic flux

* ###### *Converts Fusion Speed Energy into usable Magnetic Torque Energy*

### 

# BEU

## Benevolent Electron Units

These Cute Bubbles from CyberSpace have the power to communicate and quell rampaging robots by curing corruption in robot neural networks.

Beu are how FusionGirl can interface with robots and operate as a little holographic fairy.

The Beu communicates using music and tonality: entirely functioning on melody, songs and patterns for communication.

Beu are psionic entities, existing beyond planet-side CyberSpace, existing across the PsiNet of the local cosmos.

# Base-12 Harmonic Animation System

## Music Makes the Level Happen

Game world animations and npc behavior patterns are affected by the Animation System

# Robot Dreams

FusionGirl has the power to psionically enter the dreams of any cyberlinked robots.  
With the permission of the robot, and a firmware upgrade from the Beu, Jane can be teleported into a virtual world within the mind of the robot to help alleviate the robot’s soul problems.

During the Time Wars, humanity discovered how to develop Soul Drives, which the robots took and built into themselves: upgrading them to becoming Psionic Robots. All robots with psionic abilities can be accessed using psionic technology.

## Puzzle Worlds and Mental Games

All of Psychology applies: any mental illness in mindful beings can be cured psychically.  
The Nefarium will stop at nothing to corrupt the souls and disrupt the spirits of all life.
